product.name: ArPo
descriptions: ArPo is micro polar fabric, mostly used to make winter jackets. Polar fabric creates extra heat insulation as basic use or as lining
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Fleece is a common apparel fabric but no explicit sportswear or athletic use is stated; only 'winter jacket' is mentioned.

modelOutput.noMatchReason: Product is described as a polyester polar fleece used for winter jackets and insulation/lining, with no explicit statement of military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hi-vis, medical, sport, architecture/building, or transport application.
